data.title: Burckhardt Compression secures major order from Hanwha Ocean for next-generation LNG carrier series featuring new BOG compressor technology
data.description: Hanwha Ocean, based in South Korea, has recently awarded Burckhardt Compression a substantial contract for the provision of 14 boil-off gas (BOG) compressors.

data.title: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) Positions for Onshoring of Advanced Optical Systems Under New National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) Mandate
data.description: In Rochester, New York, on March 23, 2026, Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX), a leading manufacturer of critical technologies for defense and various markets, has revealed that its vertical integration provides advantages to optics integrators in the United States due to the recently passed National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). This legislation emphasizes the importance of using domestic sources for glass and optical systems in defense technology. The move signifies a significant change towards relying on domestic resources, highlighting Syntec's production capabilities in the U.S. as vital. The company is well-equipped to meet the increased demand from defense technology integrators looking to secure their supply chains.

data.title: GCL notified of Nasdaq deficiency for not meeting minimum bid price; share price below $1.00.
data.description: The latest report on the global economy reveals a significant growth of 5.6% in the GDP for the past quarter, exceeding expectations. This growth can be attributed to a rise in consumer spending by 7%, the highest in the past five years. Additionally, job creation has seen an increase of 3.2%, leading to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 4.1%. The stock market has also responded positively to these developments, with a 10% increase in the main indexes. Experts are optimistic about the future economic outlook, foreseeing continued growth and stability in the coming months.

data.title: Guardian Capital Group Limited Announces Expected Closing Date For Take-Private Transaction With Desjardins
data.description: In Toronto on March 20, 2026 Guardian Capital Group Limited (TSX: GCG) (TSX: GCG.A) has confirmed the receipt of all regulatory approvals necessary for the finalization of a previously announced statutory plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act (Ontario). This arrangement involves Desjardins Global Asset Management Inc., a Desjardins Group affiliate, acquiring all outstanding Common shares and Class A shares of Guardian Capital Group Limited (referred to collectively as Guardian Shares), excluding shares held by specified shareholders with equity rollover agreements, for C$68.00 per Guardian Share in cash.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. – Announcement of Availability of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (OET) disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The report is accessible for download on the SEC’s website and the Investor Relations section of OET's website. Interested parties can also receive hard copies of the audited financial statements for free by contacting the Company via email or mail at ir@okeanisecotankers.com or Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., Ethnarchou Makariou av. & 2 D. Falireos st., 18547 Neo Faliro, Greece. The Company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the symbol ECO and on the OSE under the symbol OET.

data.title: Getty Images Receives Notice from NYSE Regarding Continued Listing Standard
data.description: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GETY) revealed that on March 17, 2026, it was notified by the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) about its non-compliance with Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This entails maintaining a minimum average closing share price of $1.00 over a 30-day trading span.

data.title: Caris Life Sciences Finalizes Achieve 1 Study Results Reinforcing the Superior Sensitivity and Specificity of Caris Detect
data.description: A recent study revealed the effectiveness of Whole Genome Sequencing over methylation-based methods. Based in Irving, Texas, Caris Life Sciences® (NASDAQ: CAI), a top patient-focused AI TechBio company specializing in precision medicine, shared these results on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Worth Raises $30 Million in Series A Funding to Fuel Record Growth
data.description: Three prominent investment firms, Fulcrum Equity Partners, Amex Ventures, and TTV Capital, have made significant investments in Worth's AI-powered platform. This funding boost is set to propel the advancement of AI-driven small and medium-sized business onboarding and underwriting processes for financial institutions. This strategic move signifies a major step in shaping the future landscape of AI technology in the financial sector.

data.title: Sun Life U.S. announces continued support of the Gap Year Program at Northeastern University's Roux Institute in honor of recently retired company president, Dan Fishbein, M.D.
data.description: A program established by the Roux Institute in Portland, Maine aims to enhance healthcare accessibility across the state. On March 31, 2026, Sun Life U.S. declared ongoing backing for this initiative in tribute to former company president, Dr. Dan Fishbein. This support will aid the Roux Institute's Pre-Clinical program, showcasing a commitment to improving healthcare in Maine.

data.title: Mesabi Metallics Secures $520 Million from Breakwall Capital - Advances towards Q3 2026 start of New American Iron Ore Mine
data.description: In a move aimed at enhancing U.S. critical mineral security and bolstering the domestic steel supply chain, Mesabi Metallics Company LLC, affiliated with the Essar Group, has disclosed a recent deal worth $520 million. This financing initiative marks a significant step towards reshoring the American steel industry in Nashwauk, Minnesota.

data.title: Nike Tops Views, Turnaround Efforts Continue. China Sales Lag.
data.description: Nike, a retail giant listed on the Dow Jones, has made significant progress in implementing its recovery strategy as it surpasses third-quarter expectations. Despite this positive news, the company has reported a decline in profits and ongoing issues with lagging sales in China. The firm's efforts to turn around its performance seem to be paying off, with the latest results exceeding analyst forecasts. However, challenges persist in key markets like China, where sales growth continues to be sluggish. This update showcases Nike's commitment to improving its financial standing and market position, as it navigates through both successes and setbacks in its operations.

data.title: AltaPointe Health Now Providing Breakthrough Therapy for Treatment-Resistant Depression
data.description: In Mobile, Alabama on March 31, 2026, Major Depressive Disorder proves to be a prominent and complex diagnosis for AltaPointe Health, affecting approximately 45,000 patients. The organization's medical expert highlighted that depression may not exhibit obvious symptoms and could be concealed beneath a façade of normalcy.
